    • ProcessService

      public ProcessService()

  • Method Details

    • getLiveProcesses

      public List<oshi.software.os.OSProcess> getLiveProcesses()

    • init

      @PostConstruct public void init()
      Initializes the service by scheduling process observation and registering process-aware listeners.

    • getRunningProcesses

      public List<oshi.software.os.OSProcess> getRunningProcesses(Project project)
      Gets a list of running processes for a project. Uses a cached pattern to improve performance.
      Parameters:
      project - the project to get running processes for
      Returns:
      a list of running processes for the project

    • getProcessById

      public oshi.software.os.OSProcess getProcessById(int pid)

    • osProcessFromProcess

      public oshi.software.os.OSProcess osProcessFromProcess(Process process)

    • registerOnKillListener

      public void registerOnKillListener(Consumer<oshi.software.os.OSProcess> listener)

    • observe

      public void observe(Project project)

    • stopObserving

      public void stopObserving()
      Stops observing processes and cleans up resources. This method is called when the application is shutting down or when observation is no longer needed.

    • scheduleProcessObserving

      public void scheduleProcessObserving()
      Schedules a task to periodically check if observed processes are still running. If a process is no longer running, it notifies listeners and removes it from the live set.

    • destroy

      @PreDestroy public void destroy()
      Cleans up resources when the service is being destroyed.
